meta.coverage: Condominio Andes Chillán apartment radius and buffered Ruta N-55 corridor from Pinto
limitations: Apartment coordinate is approximate until an entrance or parking point is manually verified.
The corridor buffer is a discovery boundary, not a driving route or legal road boundary.
OpenStreetMap coverage is incomplete and does not prove that an establishment does not exist.
Google Places was queried only when a server-side credential was available.
Tripadvisor content was queried only with credentials and explicit confirmation that combined display is licensed.
Opening hours, ratings and review counts may change after the recorded provider check.

summary.es: Variante directa y dura hacia Laguna Huemul; ideal como dato experto, no como paseo familiar.
summary.pt: Variante direta e dura em direção a Laguna Huemul; ideal como dado experto, não como passeio familiar.
summary.en: Direct and steep variant to Huemul Lagoon; ideal as expert tip, not a family outing.

safetyNotes.es: Mucho desnivel; GPS offline, agua y retorno con luz.
safetyNotes.pt: Muito desnível; GPS offline, água e retorno com luz.
safetyNotes.en: Steep gradient; offline GPS, water and return with daylight.

summary.es: Alternativa de subida fuerte usada para conectar con rutas altas del valle.
summary.pt: Alternativa de subida forte usada para conectar com trilhas altas do vale.
summary.en: Strong climb alternative used to connect with higher valley routes.

safetyNotes.es: Última bajada empinada con huellas; casco, protecciones y bici adecuada.
safetyNotes.pt: Última descida íngreme com pegadas; capacete, proteções e bici adequada.
safetyNotes.en: Steep final descent with tracks; helmet, protections and suitable bike.

summary.es: Sendero MTB azul del valle, muy buen candidato para card de bicicleta.
summary.pt: Trilha MTB azul do vale, muito bom candidato para card de bicicleta.
summary.en: Blue MTB trail of the valley, very good candidate for bike card.

safetyNotes.es: Revisar sentido, peatones y condiciones.
safetyNotes.pt: Verificar sentido, pedestres e condições.
safetyNotes.en: Check direction, pedestrians and conditions.

summary.es: Pista corta azul para sumar variedad MTB cerca del valle.

summary.en: Short blue trail to add MTB variety near the valley.

zone.es: Frente a Rucahue Market hacia Robledal Hotel

zone.en: Across from Rucahue Market towards Robledal Hotel

safetyNotes.en: Helmet mandatory; watch children and keep clean.

summary.es: Pumptrack público y familiar, ideal para niños o calentamiento MTB.

summary.es: Ruta MTB fuerte hacia Shangri-La, ruinas y pistas locales; buena para riders con experiencia.
